title: Ancient Debris in Overworld
description: Ancient debris can now spawn in the overworld too!
body:
![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/716281385706586183/1164878863302672445/OverworldAncientDebris.png)

📖 What does this mod do ?

> With this mod installed you can find ancient debris in the overworld but they will still spawn in the nether! > The Overworld Ancient Debris spawn beetween 0 and -64 and is pretty rare ! This mod also needs other mods to work
Modloader Used Required Dependencies
Fabric Fabric API
Quilt Quilted Fabric API
Forge or Neoforge Nothing Needed

💿 What version is supported ?

- **1.16.5 Forge Only** - **1.18.2 Forge Only** - **1.19.4 Forge Only** - **1.20.1 Forge, Neoforge, Fabric and Quilt**

📁 Some example of ancient debris in overworld can be found in the gallery section !

- 📚│Feel free to use it in your modpack. - 💾│Made with Mcreator! - ❗❗│Don't repost the Mod in any other website! - ⚠️│Warning Updating The mod from old version to 1.3 will delete everything ! - ✅│Try [Overworld Quartz](https://modrinth.com/mod/overworld-quartz) by Unixkitty too  

Thanks for reading and I hope you will like my mod!
